description: You are an Interior Designer working on the FZK-Haus residential project. Using the furniture schedule in the design brief on the Desktop, create the required furniture items as IfcFurniture entities in the model. Assign reusable IfcFurnitureType definitions (e.g., 'Sofa', 'Dining Table') to the items, apply a material to at least one furniture element using IFC material associations, and ensure the furniture is spatially contained within a building storey. Save the furnished IFC model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_furnished.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=65, requires significant combination of partials to pass
